changelog: Status bar and navigation bar both hidden (swipe to peek)
System navigation bar hidden for full-screen experience
Landscape mode: vertical sidebar nav + mini player above channels
Top bar decluttered: Sort, Mosaic, What's On moved to Settings
Quick Actions in Settings: Sort Channels, What's On Now, Mosaic
Favorites tab loads by default on startup
PiP corner: tap ↩ to restore mini player without going fullscreen
